scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-light
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium
scale.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-slate-400 font-bold

glassmorphism_rules.note: Glassmorphism should be used for high-value surfaces (sidebar, cards, modals). The main app background should remain solid deep navy (#020617).

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(37,99,235,0.4)]
buttons.secondary_glass: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors backdrop-blur-md

cards.bento_item: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden

charts.styling: Use glowing lines, remove Cartesian grid lines for a cleaner look, use custom glass tooltips. Ensure chart colors pop against the dark glass background.

images.description: Premium abstract 3D glass background for the landing page hero section
Abstract 3D rendering for the strategy features section (avalanche/snowball)
Calm dark ocean image representing financial peace of mind
Modern dark glass architecture for the about/mission section

accessibility.contrast: Text over glassmorphism must have high contrast. Use white or very light gray text. Do not use pure gray on dark backgrounds.

testing.data_testid: Required on all interactive elements. e.g., data-testid='add-debt-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the landing page with custom HTML/Tailwind, using the glassmorphism variables and the provided background images.
Build the dashboard using Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to match the dark glassmorphism aesthetic.
Do NOT use pure #000000; use the deep navy #020617 as the base background.
Apply `backdrop-blur-xl` and `bg-slate-900/40` or `bg-white/5` with `border-white/10` to all dashboard cards.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states defined. Text color must be explicitly defined on hover.
Use Recharts for the Payoff Timeline Line Chart and Debt Breakdown Doughnut Chart. Make the chart lines glow using drop-shadow.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn').
Install the required font and icon dependencies before building.
